subject: Re: Bulk Valve Order - Special Terms
body: Hi Team, Following up on our discussion, Acme Corp is looking for 500+ industrial valves with priority delivery within 10 days. We'd appreciate a competitive rate given our long-standing partnership. Our previous order was at ₹1080/unit. We expect similar or better pricing this time. Also, free installation would be a strong deciding factor for us. Looking forward to your quotation. Regards, Rajesh Kumar, Procurement Head, Acme Corp

subject: RFP - Hydraulic Sensors for Manufacturing Line
body: Dear TechFlow, GlobalTech requires 200 hydraulic pressure sensors for our new manufacturing facility in Pune. Delivery needed within 3 weeks. Budget is approximately ₹1600 per unit. We are evaluating 3 vendors and will select based on price, warranty, and delivery speed. Please submit your formal quotation by March 25th.

subject: Updated Discount Policy - Q2 2025
body: Team, please note the following policy updates for Q2 2025: 1) All bulk orders (500+ units) now qualify for 5% discount instead of the previous 3%. 2) Premium clients (3+ previous orders) get additional 2% loyalty discount. 3) International orders must include 5% forex buffer. 4) No discounts below 8% margin under any circumstances. These supersede all previous email communications regarding pricing.

subject: Re: Margin Policy Clarification
body: Hi Finance Team, Just confirming - our minimum margin for valves is 10% and sensors is 12%. For bulk orders above 1000 units, we can go down to 8% margin with manager approval. The old policy of 15% minimum margin is no longer in effect as of January 2025. Please update your systems accordingly.

subject: Delivery Capability Update
body: Sales Team, Current delivery capabilities: Valves - 7 business days for orders up to 500 units, 14 days for 500+. Sensors - 5 business days standard. Actuators - 10 business days (imported components). Express delivery available at 15% surcharge. Stock levels are healthy for Q1 orders.
